description: Hybrid roundtrip with a 2048-byte plaintext under an RSA-2048 recipient. Verifies that the RSA-OAEP-AES256GCM-SHA256 suite lifts the n-66 ceiling of Section 8.4. The same plaintext under RSA-OAEP-SHA256 would have been rejected at producer step 4 (Section 10.1) with plaintext-too-large.

cases.description: 2048-byte plaintext to a 2048-bit recipient under the hybrid suite.

expected.plaintext: This plaintext exceeds the RSA-OAEP-SHA256 ceiling under RSA-2048 (190 bytes) and even under RSA-4096 (446 bytes).
